data.description:
## Why
Live red-error before Save + per-kind help. Validated by spike E4 (server round-trip p99 ~0.5ms,
single source of truth, no client-side ajv).

## What
- A `/validate` editor endpoint (`src/rebar/llm/workflow/editor.py`) hitting the existing Python
  registry validator; the front-end (`editor_assets/`) debounces edits and maps returned errors to
  editor markers (red error before Save).
- A per-kind HELP panel rendering element types + expected JSON shape, driven by the contracts/
  descriptions.

## Scope
In: validate endpoint + debounced markers + help panel. Out: structured fields (S8).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Editing the step config field shows a red error before Save (debounced server round-trip); a valid config clears it.
- [ ] The help panel shows element types + the expected JSON shape per kind.
- [ ] A browser e2e exercises live validation (invalid -> error, fix -> clear).
data.title: In-editor JSON validation (debounced server round-trip) + element/contract help
